original_image_tags: A single sheet of aged, beige, gridded paper (graph paper with light blue lines). The page is mostly blank, with a horizontal crease or fold line across the middle. At the bottom right, a handwritten identification number is written in red ink. There are minor smudges and a small torn notch on the left edge, midway down.

elements.description: Back or blank page of a document on grid paper. The page is mostly blank except for a horizontal fold line and some faint red handwritten numbers at the bottom right that read '62-83894-6XX'.
